summary: European Central Bank officials are facing the risk that inflation will hover above their goal “for quite some time,” according to Chief Economist Philip Lane.

title: Stocks Hit by Tech Selloff as Korean Shares Plunge: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 韩国股市暴跌，科技股遭遇抛售：市场总结
summary: A selloff cascaded across global markets as investors turned jittery about high-flying tech stocks and frothy valuations. South Korea’s Kospi Index plunged 10% from a record high.

title: Oil Edges Lower as Iran Waiver Signals Peace Talks Progress
title_cn: 伊朗豁免标志着和平谈判取得进展，油价小幅走低
summary: Oil edged lower as traders gauged signs of progress toward an agreement to end the Iran war, which included a US waiver allowing some sales of crude and fuels from the Islamic Republic.

title: Gold Slumps as Tech Selloff Reverberates Through Global Markets
title_cn: 科技股抛售席卷全球市场，金价暴跌
summary: Gold slumped toward $4,000 an ounce and silver plunged as much as 5% as a broad selloff swept through financial markets.

title: Bristow Is Said to Near Berry Aviation Deal in Government Push
title_cn: 据说布里斯托在政府推动下接近贝里航空交易
summary: Bristow Group Inc. is nearing an acquisition of privately held Berry Aviation Inc. as it seeks to expand in the government services sector, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: High Frequency Traders Expand Push Into Currency Options Market
title_cn: 高频交易员扩大进军货币期权市场
summary: High-speed trading firms are making fresh inroads into the currency options market, with IMC Trading and Susquehanna International Group expanding globally and Optiver Holding pursuing more complex offerings.

title: Euro Hits August Low as Lagarde’s Rates Talk Diverges From Fed
title_cn: 拉加德的利率言论与美联储分歧，欧元触及八月低点
summary: The euro fell to its lowest level since August after weak economic data and dovish comments from European Central Bank President Christine Lagarde prompted traders to pare back their bets on interest-rate hikes.

title: Yen Intervention Risk Rises After Katayama-Bessent Talks
title_cn: 片山-贝森特会谈后日元干预风险上升
summary: Currency traders are on high alert for intervention after further weakness in the yen and a call between Japanese Finance Minister Satsuki Katayama and US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent.

title: Sturgeon’s Estranged Husband Gets 5 Years for Embezzlement
title_cn: 斯特金分居的丈夫因贪污罪被判五年徒刑
summary: The Scottish National Party’s former chief executive — who’s also the estranged husband of ex-leader Nicola Sturgeon — was sentenced to five years and three months in prison after admitting to embezzling more than £400,000 ($529,000).

title: Monte Paschi CEO Lovaglio Says He Welcomes Interest in Bank
title_cn: Monte Paschi 首席执行官 Lovaglio 表示欢迎对该银行的兴趣
summary: Banca Monte dei Paschi di Siena SpA Chief Executive Officer Luigi Lovaglio said he’s pleased with the competing proposals for his bank as they show the value created in its turnaround, and plans to assess all options in the interest of stakeholders.

title: AllianzGI Gets $744 Million for Latest APAC Private Credit Fund
title_cn: AllianzGI 为最新亚太地区私人信贷基金筹集 7.44 亿美元
summary: Allianz Global Investors secured $744 Million in commitments for the first close of its latest private credit fund targeting investments in the Asia Pacific, underscoring sustained investor interest for the asset class in the region.

title: Hormuz Traffic Picks Up as More Tankers Broadcast Crossings
title_cn: 随着更多油轮广播过境点，霍尔木兹交通量增加
summary: More ships are openly signaling their intention to traverse the Strait of Hormuz, pointing to growing confidence among shipowners and traders about sending vessels through the chokepoint as tensions ease.

title: Porsche CEO Sticks to Profit Outlook, Promises Leaner Lineup
title_cn: 保时捷首席执行官坚持盈利前景，承诺精简阵容
summary: Porsche AG confirmed its profit outlook for the year as the 911 maker pushes to become leaner to revive margins battered by US tariffs and weak demand in China.

title: CATL Debuts Battery Storage System Using Sodium, Not Lithium
title_cn: CATL推出使用钠而不是锂的电池存储系统
summary: Contemporary Amperex Technology Co. Ltd. has launched a new sodium battery storage system, slated for initial delivery in China this September, as the battery giant aims to further ramp up sodium battery capacity amid growing energy storage needs from data centers.

title: SoftBank-Backed Car Marketplace Carro Is Said to Explore US IPO
title_cn: 软银支持的汽车市场 Carro 据称将探索美国 IPO
summary: Used-car marketplace Carro is considering filing confidentially for an initial public offering in the US as soon as this month, people familiar with the matter said, testing investor appetite for Southeast Asian startups.

title: ECB’s Escrivá Says Oil Starting to Ripple Through Other Sectors
title_cn: 欧洲央行行长埃斯克里瓦表示，石油开始波及其他行业
summary: European Central Bank Governing Council member Jose Luis Escrivá said high oil prices are feeding through to other parts of the economy.

title: Gold Bulls Gut Outlooks as Deutsche Bank Follows Goldman’s Cut
title_cn: 德意志银行跟随高盛降息，黄金多头担忧前景
summary: Deutsche Bank AG reduced gold price forecasts by as much as 22%, as investors become more wary about the outlook for US monetary policy and investment demand for the precious metal dries up.

title: Chinese Stocks in Hong Kong Extend Slump to Enter Bear Market
title_cn: 香港中概股延续跌势进入熊市
summary: Chinese equities in Hong Kong entered a bear market as sentiment soured on tepid consumer spending and fading confidence in e-commerce firms.

title: Indonesia Orders Miners to Provide More Coal Amid Blackouts
title_cn: 印度尼西亚命令矿工在停电期间提供更多煤炭
summary: Indonesia’s energy ministry directed miners to urgently boost domestic coal supplies just before the country was hit by rolling blackouts, the latest strain on President Prabowo Subianto’s administration following a week of protests.

title: Iran Rushes to Woo Asia’s Top Oil Importers After US Waiver
title_cn: 美国豁免后伊朗急于吸引亚洲最大石油进口国
summary: Iran is racing to court some of Asia’s largest oil buyers as a 60-day US sanctions waiver takes effect, a temporary lifeline that should allow Tehran to resume exports and begin clearing a backlog of cargoes on the water, even as peace talks continue.

title: Heineken Names Coffee CEO Oliveira to Lead Turnaround
title_cn: 喜力任命咖啡首席执行官奥利维拉领导扭亏为盈
summary: Heineken NV appointed Rafael Oliveira chief executive officer, as the Dutch brewer breaks with habit by hiring an outsider to try to reverse a slump in demand.

title: Euro-Zone Business Activity Shows Resilience to Iran War Fallout
title_cn: 欧元区商业活动显示出对伊朗战争影响的韧性
summary: Business activity in the euro area shrank less than anticipated in June, feeding optimism that the region’s economy can weather faster inflation and the jolt to confidence dealt by the Iran war.

title: IG4 Says It Can Buy All Raizen Debt in Cash to Gain Control
title_cn: IG4表示可以用现金购买所有Raizen债务以获得控制权
summary: Private equity firm IG4 Capital said it has enough capital to buy Raizen SA debt entirely in cash if needed as it seeks to acquire enough of the troubled sugar and ethanol producer’s obligations to end up with a 50.1% equity stake.

title: Korean Stocks Tumble 10% as Extreme Volatility Rattles Investors
title_cn: 极度波动令投资者不安，韩国股市暴跌 10%
summary: South Korean stocks tumbled from a record high as investors sold off chip heavyweights, delivering another outsized swing that has become a feature of the world’s best‑performing market this year.

title: Nomura Joins Sony in Powering Big Week for Japan Bond Sales
title_cn: 野村证券与索尼一起为日本债券销售大周提供动力
summary: Nomura Holdings Inc. and Sony Group Corp. are leading a slew of deals from Asia in global bond markets on Tuesday, in what is shaping up to be one of the biggest weeks this year for Japanese issuance overseas.

title: Ziemba: Iran Looking to Monetize & Weaponize Hormuz
title_cn: Ziemba：伊朗希望将霍尔木兹海峡货币化并武器化
summary: Oil steadied after falling more than 3% in previous sessions following early progress in peace talks over the Iran war. A US waiver allows some sales from Iran, offering them a crucial economic lifeline. Rachel Ziemba, Founder of Ziemba Insights spoke to Bloomberg’s Abeer Abu Omar on Horizons Middle East and Africa on the energy markets response to the US-Iran talks. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Horizons Middle East & Africa 6/23/2026
title_cn: 中东和非洲地平线 6/23/2026
summary: Horizons Middle East & Africa is your daily spotlight on one of the world's fastest-growing regions. Live from Dubai, we bring you the latest global markets and analysis, plus news-making interviews, with a special focus on MEA. All that and more, as you head to the office in the Gulf, pause for lunch in Hong Kong, or start your day in London or Johannesburg.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Aluminum Leads Tumble in Metals as Tech Selloff Fuels Bear Mood
title_cn: 科技股抛售加剧悲观情绪，铝铅价格暴跌
summary: Aluminum tumbled by more than 4%, and other metals posted sharp declines, after a bearish turn for equities weighed on sentiment in commodities markets.

title: IFM Investors Passes 50% Stake in Deal Target Atlas Arteria
title_cn: IFM 投资者持有交易目标 Atlas Arteria 50% 的股份
summary: IFM Investors has passed the 50% threshold in its holdings of Australia-listed toll road operator Atlas Arteria Ltd. and extended its takeover bid.

title: Kalshi Adds India to Restricted List After Prediction Market Ban
title_cn: Kalshi 在预测市场禁令后将印度添加到限制名单中
summary: Kalshi Inc. has added India to its list of restricted jurisdictions, weeks after the country’s technology ministry warned that prediction markets platforms were illegal and moved to curb access to such sites.

title: The Growing Crisis for America's Child Abuse Investigators
title_cn: 美国虐待儿童调查人员面临的日益严重的危机
summary: With the proliferation of AI-generated abuse material, police and investigators aren't getting the robust mental health support they need.

title: European Stocks Drop as Korea Tech Rout Ripples Through Markets
title_cn: 韩国科技股溃败席卷市场，欧洲股市下跌
summary: European stocks were swept up in a selloff in technology firms that started in Korea and rippled through global markets.

title: Stocks Hit by Tech Selloff as Korean Shares Plunge
title_cn: 韩国股市暴跌，科技股遭遇抛售
summary: A selloff in technology stocks is dragging global equities lower, led by a retreat in chipmakers that have been at the forefront of an unprecedented AI-driven rally, as Neil Campling reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Why SpaceX Shares Are Under Pressure
title_cn: 为什么 SpaceX 的股价面临压力
summary: Less than two weeks after the year’s most hotly anticipated IPO, investors are questioning the remaining upside of a company that seeks to raise billions in investor-grade debt as the AI trade stalls and other major offerings from OpenAI and Anthropic loom. Bloomberg's Charlie Wells discusses on "The Pulse with Francine Lacqua." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: EU to Escalate Meta Probe Into Addictive Design That Hooks Kids
title_cn: 欧盟将对吸引儿童的成瘾设计升级元调查
summary: The European Union is set to ramp up an investigation into Meta Platforms Inc. that alleges its products are addictive to children, as the bloc increases regulatory pressure on the US social media company.

title: US Tech Stocks Set to Slide as AI Rout Hits Global Peers
title_cn: 随着人工智能溃败袭击全球同行，美国科技股将下滑
summary: US technology stocks are set to slump on Tuesday after a selloff in Korean chipmakers stoked concerns about the sustainability of the artificial intelligence-related rally.

title: Allianz CIO Sees Markets Pricing 'Darwinian Effect of AI'
title_cn: 安联首席信息官认为市场定价是“人工智能的达尔文效应”
summary: Ludovic Subran, chief investment officer and chief economist at Allianz, discusses the outlook for technology stocks, inflation and central bank policy. He speaks on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Rout Set to Push Market Value Below $2 Trillion
title_cn: SpaceX 惨败将使市值跌破 2 万亿美元
summary: SpaceX shares extended declines in premarket trading, a day after the company saw the second-largest single-session drop in market value on record.

title: Korean Stocks Fall 10% From Record
title_cn: 韩国股市较纪录下跌 10%
summary: South Korean stocks tumbled from a record high as investors sold off chip heavyweights on renewed concern that the rally has become overstretched. The Kospi closed down 10%, with losses extending after a 20-minute trading suspension by the Korea Exchange. Bloomberg's Neil Campling has the latest. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Prosus Develops OpenClaw Rival to Address Privacy Concerns
title_cn: Prosus 开发 OpenClaw 竞争对手来解决隐私问题
summary: Prosus NV has developed its own version of the artificial intelligence agent OpenClaw to get around European concerns over data privacy, and will start rolling it out this week.

title: Tech Selloff Hits Asia as Korea Stocks Slide | Insight with Haslinda Amin 06/23/2026
title_cn: 韩国股市下滑，科技股遭遇抛售哈斯琳达·阿明的见解 06/23/2026
summary: Insight with Haslinda Amin, a daily news program featuring in-depth, high-profile interviews and analysis to give viewers the complete picture on the stories that matter. The show features prominent leaders spanning the worlds of business, finance, politics and culture. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: India’s Biggest Equity Fund Makes Contrarian IT Stocks Bet
title_cn: 印度最大的股票基金逆势押注 IT 股票
summary: India’s largest actively managed equity fund is betting against investor fears over artificial intelligence’s impact on the outsourcing industry as it snaps up the nation’s beaten-down IT stocks.

title: Masayoshi Son Dismisses Musk’s Idea for Orbital Data Centers
title_cn: 孙正义驳斥了马斯克关于轨道数据中心的想法
summary: SoftBank Group Corp. founder Masayoshi Son said there’s little merit to building data centers in space, as championed by Elon Musk, predicting that the AI race will be clinched by computing resources on Earth.

title: Billionaire Sex-For-Visa Claim at WiseTech Tests Investor Limits
title_cn: 慧咨科技以性换签证的亿万富翁索赔考验投资者极限
summary: Allegations that WiseTech Global Ltd.’s billionaire chairman, Richard White, took advantage of a woman’s immigration status for sex are testing the patience of the Australian software company’s shareholders.

title: The Hidden Costs of Leveraged ETFs
title_cn: 杠杆ETF的隐性成本
summary: A leveraged ETF linked to SK Hynix has grown larger than Hong Kong's oldest ETF, which tracks the Hang Seng Index. The milestone highlights investors' voracious appetite for risky bets on the booming semiconductor sector. However, Bloomberg Intelligence says products such as the SK Hynix 2x Leveraged ETF carry a hidden structural drag that could erode investor returns over time. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Europe Sees 6 Billion Reasons for New Levy on Online Shoppers
title_cn: 欧洲有 60 亿个理由对网购者征收新税
summary: Bargain-hunting consumers across the European Union will start feeling the pinch of higher online shopping costs next week when a new levy primarily targeting China comes into force, adding a layer of trade friction between the two economies.

title: India to Share Rocket Tech to Hasten Development of Space Firms
title_cn: 印度将分享火箭技术以加速航天公司的发展
summary: India said it plans to share its technology involving the Polar Satellite Launch Vehicle, the country’s most reliable rocket, to help speed up development of the local space industry.

title: Qualcomm Is Said to Near Deal for AI Software Firm Modular
title_cn: 据称高通即将收购人工智能软件公司 Modular
summary: Qualcomm Inc. is in advanced talks to acquire Modular Inc. in a transaction valuing the artificial intelligence infrastructure software company at about $4 billion, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: WiseTech Chairman White Denies Human Trafficking Involvement
title_cn: 慧咨科技董事长怀特否认参与人口贩卖
summary: WiseTech Global Ltd. said Chairman Richard White has denied being involved in human trafficking after reports that the billionaire is being investigated by police over claims he used a woman’s immigration status for sex.

title: Internet Stocks Will Be Next Area of AI Cycle, Standard Chartered Says
title_cn: 渣打银行表示，互联网股票将成为人工智能周期的下一个领域
summary: Standard Chartered's Daniel Lam says the US equities market is "probably going to have a little bit of mild correction, not a lot, or stay around the current levels." He also tells Bloomberg Television that "the next area of this AI cycle is going to be the internet stocks." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Fall Continues, Erasing Billions in Market Value
title_cn: SpaceX 持续下跌，市值蒸发数十亿
summary: SpaceX shares slipped for a third straight day, shedding hundreds of billions of dollars in market value, after the company said it is selling investment-grade bonds for the first time. Bloomberg's Anthony Stephens and Norah Mulinda break down the latest developments. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gas Stations Accused of Using AI to Boost California Prices
title_cn: 加油站被指控利用人工智能推高加州油价
summary: A group of California consumers claimed in a lawsuit that gas station owners including Walmart Inc., Marathon Petroleum Corp., BP Plc and 7-Eleven Inc. are using artificial intelligence to illegally manipulate pump prices in the state that already has the highest rates in the US.

title: Tech Selloff Drags Stocks Lower | The Close 6/22/2026
title_cn: 科技股抛售拖累股市走低收盘价 2026 年 6 月 22 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Wells Fargo Global Investment Strategist Veronica Willis, US Bank Chief Product Officer, Business Banking Shruti Patel, Susquehanna Senior Equity Research Analyst, Tech Hardware Mehdi Hosseini, Former Fed Governor & Monetary Policy Analytics Chairman Laurence Meyer, Bokeh Capital Partners Founder & Chief Investment Officer Kim Forrest, Former Kansas City Fed President Thomas Hoenig, JPM Alternatives Strategist Aaron Mulvihill, Weil, Gotshal & Manges Entertainment, Sports & Media Head Tom Ara, Cotopaxi CEO Lindsay Shumlas, & NFL Hall of Famer Terrell Owens & Syntilay CEO Ben Weiss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oracle Cut 21,000 Jobs in 12 Months, Says AI Replaced Some Roles
title_cn: 甲骨文在 12 个月内裁员 21,000 人，称人工智能取代了部分角色
summary: Oracle Corp. reduced its workforce by 21,000 employees in the past 12 months, a wider scale than previously known, including those whose jobs were eliminated by the use of artificial intelligence.

title: Vimeo Parent Bending Spoons, Backers Seek $1.62 Billion in IPO
title_cn: Vimeo 母公司 Bending Spoon 及其支持者寻求 16.2 亿美元的 IPO
summary: Bending Spoons SpA, which acquires struggling software businesses, and some of its backers are seeking to raise as much as $1.62 billion in an initial public offering.

title: Media Consolidation in Its ‘Middle Innings’: Tom Ara
title_cn: 媒体整合的“中局”：汤姆·阿拉
summary: Tom Ara, Weil, Gotshal & Manges Entertainment, Sport & Media Head, discusses significant mergers and acquisitions in Hollywood during the first half of 2026. Highlighted deals include Fox's $22 billion investment in Roku and Paramount's $110 billion acquisition of Warner Brothers Discovery. Ara explains that the market has shifted from a cautious stance last year to a more confident environment, leading to increased capital deployment and ongoing consolidation in the entertainment sector. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Getty Images Surges 145% After Announcing OpenAI Deal
title_cn: 宣布与 OpenAI 达成交易后，Getty Images 股价飙升 145%
summary: Shares of stock-photo company Getty Images Holdings Inc. soared as much as 145% on Monday after it announced a licensing deal with OpenAI.

title: SpaceX Falls for Third Day, Erases $600 Billion in Market Value
title_cn: SpaceX 连续第三天下跌，市值蒸发 6000 亿美元
summary: SpaceX shares slipped for a third straight day, shedding hundreds of billions of dollars in market value, after the Elon Musk-led company said it is selling investment-grade bonds for the first time, part of what’s expected to be a massive borrowing spree to fund its artificial-intelligence ambitions.

title: A Poisoned Chalice Awaits the Next Leader of the UK
title_cn: 有毒的圣杯等待着英国的下一任领导人
summary: Andy Burnham would need more than quick wits to last longer than his predecessors.

title: Turkish Officials Expect Syrian Leader Visit Around NATO Summit
title_cn: 土耳其官员期待叙利亚领导人在北约峰会期间访问
summary: Turkish officials expect Syria’s president to visit Ankara around the time Turkey is hosting a NATO summit there next month, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Merz Plans to Channel Billions Into Markets With Pension Reform
title_cn: 默茨计划通过养老金改革将数十亿美元引入市场
summary: Germany is looking at a new mandatory pension contribution that would funnel billions into capital markets as part of a broad effort to shore up the country’s retirement system.

title: Hungary Approves Anti-Graft Law to Satisfy EU Funds Criteria
title_cn: 匈牙利批准反腐败法以满足欧盟基金标准
summary: Hungary’s parliament approved comprehensive anti-corruption legislation to meet a key demand of the European Union for the release of funds the bloc had been withholding under former Prime Minister Viktor Orban’s rule.

title: Czech President Turns to Court to Contest NATO Summit Exclusion
title_cn: 捷克总统诉诸法庭反对北约峰会排除
summary: President Petr Pavel turned to a top Czech court over the government’s decision to exclude him from the delegation that’s slated to represent the country at the NATO summit in Turkey next month.

title: Slain Dissident’s Daughter Maps Out a Plan for Cuba After Communism
title_cn: 被杀持不同政见者的女儿为共产主义后的古巴制定了计划
summary: Rosa María Payá was 23 when her father died on his way to a pro-democracy meeting. With Donald Trump’s help, she’s now hoping to complete his mission.

title: Rosa María Payá, la disidente que busca liderar el cambio en Cuba
title_cn: 罗莎·玛丽亚·帕亚 (Rosa María Payá)，寻求领导古巴变革的异见人士
summary: Rosa María Payá tenía 12 años cuando su padre murió de camino a una reunión prodemocracia en la isla. Con la ayuda de Donald Trump, ahora espera poder completar su misión.

title: Iran Says $12 Billion to Be Unfrozen Ahead of Rubio’s Gulf Tour
title_cn: 伊朗表示将在卢比奥海湾之行之前解冻120亿美元
summary: Iran said $12 billion of its frozen funds were set to be released as part of ongoing talks with the US, with the two sides broadly signaling progress in negotiations to formally end their war.

title: Burnham to Flesh Out Economic Plan With Chancellor Pick Looming
title_cn: 伯纳姆将在财政大臣人选临近的情况下充实经济计划
summary: Andy Burnham is under pressure to outline an economic plan for the UK following his sudden and spectacular rise toward the pinnacle of British politics.

title: Romania in Last-Ditch Attempt to Form Cabinet After Vote Fails
title_cn: 投票失败后罗马尼亚组建内阁的最后努力
summary: The Romanian president will make a final push for a pro-European Union government after his candidate failed to win a vote of confidence, prolonging a political deadlock that is stalling key reforms for crucial EU funding.

title: Former Fed Chairman Alan Greenspan Dies at 100 (Video) (Correct)
title_cn: 前美联储主席艾伦·格林斯潘去世，享年 100 岁（视频）（正确）
summary:
Alan Greenspan has died at the age of 100. He served as Fed chief for 18 years, from 1987 to 2006, and was credited with guiding a record US economic expansion, but his legacy was later dimmed by the financial crisis that erupted in 2008. Greenspan died on June 22 at his home due to complications of Parkinson’s disease. Bloomberg’s David Westin looks back at his accomplishments.

(Corrects error at 2’01”: Greenspan left the Fed over 20 years ago. A corrected version is being prepared and will be published as soon as possible.) (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Burnham Poised to Succeed Starmer as UK Prime Minister
title_cn: 伯纳姆准备接替斯塔默担任英国首相
summary: Labour's Andy Burnham appears set to become the UK’s seventh prime minister in a decade after Keir Starmer laid out a timeline for his own departure. The 56-year-old former Mayor of Manchester could be installed as PM as soon as July 17, if no other challenger surfaces. Bloomberg's Lizzy Burden reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Trade Chief Greer in India to Resolve Trade Pact Hurdles
title_cn: 美国贸易首席格里尔在印度解决贸易协定障碍
summary: US Trade Representative Jamieson Greer kicked off talks with Indian officials this week as both sides stepped up efforts to resolve the remaining differences holding up an interim trade agreement.

title: SpaceX Leads Global Tech Stocks Selloff | Daybreak Europe 6/23/2026
title_cn: SpaceX 引领全球科技股抛售欧洲黎明 2026 年 6 月 23 日
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

Global stocks slumped as investors rotated out of some of this year’s high-performing technology shares while awaiting further developments in US-Iran peace talks.

The US issued a 60-day license allowing Iran to sell oil on the international market, giving Tehran an economic lifeline as the two adversaries continued talks for a permanent peace deal.

And Andy Burnham appears set to become the UK’s seventh prime minister in a decade after Keir Starmer laid out a timeline for his own departure and potential rivals backed a quick transition to the popular Manchester politician.

Today's guest: Neil Wilson, UK Investor Strategist, Saxo. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: India And China Say Ties Are Moving Toward Improvement
title_cn: 印度和中国表示关系正在走向改善
summary: India’s National Security Adviser Ajit Doval met Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi on the sidelines of a BRICS security officials’ meeting in New Delhi, with both countries noting progress in improving relations.

title: What Comes Next For Hormuz Oil Flows?
title_cn: 霍尔木兹油流接下来会发生什么？
summary: The US has issued a 60-day license allowing Iran to sell oil on the international market, giving Tehran an economic lifeline as the two adversaries continued talks for a permanent peace deal. Bloomberg's Weilun Soon breaks down how it is impacting on oil flows. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Historical Tensions Mar Ukraine Reconstruction Push in Poland
title_cn: 历史紧张局势三月乌克兰重建波兰
summary: Historical grievances are threatening to derail an annual Ukraine reconstruction conference in Poland and undermine ties with one of the war-torn country’s most important European allies.

title: Australia’s PM Rejects Far Right Call for ‘Monocultural’ Society
title_cn: 澳大利亚总理拒绝极右翼呼吁建立“单一文化”社会
summary: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese rejected a call from far right party leader Senator Pauline Hanson for Australia to become a “monocultural” society, saying the idea was divisive and and based on “nonsense.”

title: Russia’s Wiki Warfare Tries to Distort Reality, Documents Show
title_cn: 文件显示，俄罗斯的维基战争试图扭曲现实
summary: Leaked files reveal the Social Design Agency’s efforts to control the information that underpins search engines and AI chatbots.

title: US Gives Philippines Underwater Vehicles as China Feud Persists
title_cn: 中美争端持续，美国向菲律宾提供水下航行器
summary: The US said it provided four underwater vehicles to the Philippine military, as Washington boosts its longtime ally’s capability to counter Beijing’s actions in the South China Sea.

title: North Korea’s Kim Wants More Nuclear Forces After US-Iran War
title_cn: 美伊战争后，朝鲜金正恩希望拥有更多核力量
summary: Kim Jong Un called for North Korea to boost its nuclear capabilities “with increasing speed” and said the “bloody situation” in the Middle East makes his nuclear push the “most correct and unique way” to defend the country, state media reported.

title: LA Defeats DOJ Suit Claiming Sanctuary City Policy Fueled Riots
title_cn: 洛杉矶击败司法部诉讼，声称庇护城市政策引发骚乱
summary: Los Angeles won a court order dismissing a Trump administration lawsuit claiming its sanctuary city ordinance helped fuel riots during 2025 protests against the president’s deportation crackdown.

title: Removals Begin at Intelligence Office Under Trump Loyalist Pulte
title_cn: 特朗普忠诚者普尔特领导下的情报办公室开始被清除
summary: A wave of staff reductions at the Office of the Director of National Intelligence began on Monday, according to a person familiar with the matter, days after Bill Pulte, a staunch loyalist to President Donald Trump, became acting director.

title: Iran Oil Waiver Offers Lifeline to Tehran as Talks Proceed
title_cn: 随着谈判的进行，伊朗石油豁免为德黑兰提供了生命线
summary: The US issued a 60-day license allowing Iran to sell oil on the international market, giving Tehran an economic lifeline as the two adversaries continued talks for a permanent peace deal.

title: Migrant Families Separated, Re-Jailed by Trump Freed by Judge
title_cn: 被特朗普拆散、重新监禁的移民家庭被法官释放
summary: A federal judge ordered the immediate release of several immigrants who were separated from family members by the Trump administration in 2018 and later detained again by US officials.

title: Bolivia Plans Push Into Morales Stronghold as Blockades Fade
title_cn: 随着封锁的解除，玻利维亚计划挺进莫拉莱斯要塞
summary: Bolivian security forces are preparing to enter the Chapare region, where former President Evo Morales has remained since late 2024, protected by thousands of supporters while evading arrest and encouraging more than 50 days of road blockades that disrupted the economy.

title: White House Set to Host Weapons Makers Amid US Stockpile Worry
title_cn: 由于美国库存担忧，白宫将接待武器制造商
summary: The White House is set to host a meeting of defense contractors this week to push for more robust munitions production, with stockpiles under strain after nearly four months of war with Iran.

title: Trump on Iran Negotiations: “We’re Doing Very Well” | Balance of Power: Late Edition 06/22/2026
title_cn: 特朗普谈伊朗谈判：“我们做得很好”|权力平衡：最新版 06/22/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Israel's Ambassador to the United Nations Danny Danon says Israel is "very comfortable" with the US representing its interests in Iran negotiations, touting a "strong alliance" with Washington even amid questions about public strains between President Trump and Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu. Joe Twyman, Co-founder and Director at DeltaPoll, says the economy and cost of living, not Epstein-related controversy, will likely be seen as the issue that brought Starmer down after the UK Prime Minister resigned. Representative Dan Goldman (D-NY), a member of the House Judiciary and Homeland Security Committees, discusses New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani's endorsement of his opponent, Brad Lander, ahead of Tuesday's primary, saying Democrats broadly agree that life is "way too expensive" for most Americans. (Source: Bloomberg)
